name_en: Medium size 24.5 cm🤩🤩🤩Chanel 24p Black Gold Hobo Medium. I've always liked the casual style of the 22 bag, the only downside is that it has no zipper and no sense of security. Now I finally found a practical and durable caviar leather hobo bag. At first, I thought this bag looked ugly, but later saw someone point out that the large size dips down. I got hooked on the casual vibe. I asked the SA when I went to pick up my New Year's gift, and they said only the medium size 24.5 cm was in stock. The only in-stock black gold one the SA couldn't find, so I tried the caramel first. After coming back, I couldn't get it out of my mind, so I told the SA to keep the black gold for me if they found it. I thought if I didn't get it, it was fate. I didn't expect the SA to be so nice. The logo is small and cute. Dimensions: 19 x 24.5 x 9cm Style A S 4293
